ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Mar-16-2006 Discharged

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Feb-16-2006 Continued For Letter To Mar-15-06 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 612

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-03-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-03-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Sauceda.
Ryan Crohn, Esq. for Plaintiff: George Ballard Company.
Plaintiff's Witness: Alan Fong, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: August Stone KLein.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Damages $19,075.35
Prejudgment Interest $1,970.50
Attorney's Fees $1,000.00
Costs $338.50, for a total of $22,384.35
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

P.M. Judgment granted in the sum of $22,420.65, signed by Comm. Kaplan

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
